programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hobie's new friend Isaac is an angry kid who will do anything to get his father's attention. His risky behavior is a problem for the lifeguards. Meanwhile, Caroline meets a jockey who has lost the will to race after an accident.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan borrows Cody's car without permission and has an accident, then lies to the police. Meanwhile, the Baywatch team settles an internal dispute with a paintball war and C.J. takes in an injured sea lion, causing problems with her roommates.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt Brody returns to Baywatch and ends up trapped on a yacht with Neely when a group of ruthless pirates takes hostages. Meanwhile, Joey's past may jeopardize her adoption by Mitch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan and Caroline’s relationship hits a new low when Caroline returns his engagement ring, but things change when a baby is left in Logan’s possession. Meanwhile, Cody must overcome yet another setback to his Olympic career.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline blames herself for a teen's death in a fiery nighttime boating accident and goes through Critical Incident Stress. Pushing everyone away, Caroline begins partying to distract from her guilt. Can the team help her recover from her PTSD?

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A mysterious, unseen creature begins attacking beachgoers, and it is up to the Baywatch team to find the creature. Meanwhile, Inside Sports Magazine wants a lifeguard for their swimsuit issue. Neely and Caroline compete for the cover.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan must help his friend Carmen raise $50,000 to keep her ranch, and Jessie Lee Harris is back in town just in time to help. Mitch finds himself in a deadly race for justice during his vacation in Baja, Mexico.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie, Caroline, and CJ become Charlie’s Angels in a fun fantasy romp through 70's television as they try and catch an escaped psychopath bent on killing lifeguards.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: CJ rescues pro wrestler Hulk Hogan, who then tells the Baywatch team that he's in town with Randy Savage to try and prevent the closure of the Venice Boys' Youth Center. Hogan must take on Ric Flair in a cage match to prevent the closure.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch is convinced by Stephanie's boyfriend Tom to go sky-surfing. Things go horribly wrong when Mitch's parachute fails to deploy! Back on the beach, CJ's lifeguarding duties are impeded when she begins dating a celebrity.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie is recruiting lifeguards for the annual Sailing Regatta where they will compete against South Bay, and Neely is taking the competition very seriously. Meanwhile, Mitch finds out Joey has grandparents who want to care for her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and Caroline rescue a woman who gets amnesia falling off the pier and must find her father to help her recover her memories. CJ meets a wheelchair-bound man who’s determined to get wheelchair access across the beach to the water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The team is invited to Hawaii for a week to oversee new lifeguard techniques and relax a bit. Logan becomes obsessed with competing in a surfing competition. To avoid a curse, CJ and Stephanie must return a sacred lava rock to its original location.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Matt is stung by a poisonous fish, he and Mitch find a village where a young woman offers to help them, resulting in all three of them running from her jealous suitor. Logan’s selfish behavior puts his relationship with Caroline in jeopardy.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jenaye comes face-to-face for the first time with the woman her husband, James, slept with on their fifth wedding anniversary. The woman, Chelsey, who is also James's former hairstylist, tells her side of the story. Will Jenaye believe Chelsey's claims?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Julie & Mike say daughter Brooke, 16, may look sweet & innocent, but she's an out-of-control teen who fights, runs away from home, shoplifts & dates older men. Plus, meet Jody, an admitted alcoholic & anorexic. Can Dr. Phil save these two from themselves?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tom is 100% convinced his fiancée, Teaka, is cheating on him with his friends, neighbors, coworkers, & even the mailman! Tom has all-new video evidence to show Dr. Phil & Teaka to prove Teaka's unfaithfulness. Teaka declares she has never cheated on Tom.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Lorie says husband, Dan, knew she placed a baby for adoption when she was 15 & he always supported her finding him. Dan says after reuniting with son, John, 26, family life shattered. Dan says he believes Lorie & John have an inappropriate relationship.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pamela says she is likely going to jail for not complying with court orders because she refuses to allow her ex, Justin, his court-ordered visitations. Pamela says Justin attempted to drown their oldest daughter in the pool. Justin says they are lies!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Many were stunned and outraged when Casey Anthony was acquitted of murder charges in her daughter Caylee's death. Lead prosecutor Jeff Ashton joins Dr. Phil to answer some hard-hitting questions about where his case went wrong.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: McKinley, 18, says she decided 5 years ago she never wanted to see her dad, Cory, again, after learning he went to jail on two counts of sexual battery of a minor! She says her dad is a violent, dangerous, "psychopath". Cory says he's never abused anyone.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Waco & Alley left their home state with their 3-year-old child, missing a custody hearing, & have no idea the court then granted guardianship to Waco's parents. Tensions run high when Dr. Phil reveals to Waco & Alley they lost custody of their child!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brooklyn, 18, says she is tired of her mom butting into her love life with boyfriend Eric. Mom Courtney says it's because Brooklyn's boyfriend has two children & a wife! Eric's wife, Mandy, wants Brooklyn to leave her husband alone & she'll fight for him.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Karen writes to Dr. Phil saying her husband mentally abuses her by telling her how fat she is, how terrible she looks, criticizes her makeup, calls her names, tells fat jokes. She hides in a bathroom to eat and he won't touch her "until she loses 200 lbs"

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Was this teacher drunk In her elementary school classroom? Listen to what this educator has to say.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: David says daughter, Danielle, 21, is out of control. She's been arrested twice, once for "clocking" a man she was dating in the face, & the second for public intoxication. She has violent rages, refuses to take her meds, does drugs, & drives drunk.Pt. 1

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After the Clampetts accidentally run into a beatnik he moves into the Clampett mansion, but neither he nor they know what to make of each other.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: As a favor to Jed Mr. Drysdale arranges for a playboy bank director (who normally only dates women half his age) to come court Granny, while Jed goes out with a beautiful woman who dates rich older men.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants Jed to find a wife and asks for Mr. Drysdale's help. He introduces Jed to Phyllis but learns too late she a gold digger and becomes alarmed when they head to the track. But it's Granny they need to worry about.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to become a "double naught" spy and converts the family's truck into his idea of a Bondmobile. But he becomes the unwitting pawn in another banker's scheme.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's biggest rival John Cushing succeeds in getting the Clampetts to transfer all of their money to his bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drydale's poodle Claude is to enter a dog show but gets sick right before. Granny offers to doctor the dog but Ellie Mae is concerned he doesn't know any tricks so she decides to help out with one of her own pets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: John Brewster, the oilman from Tulsa, is bringing his new bride to California for their honeymoon. Somehow the Clampetts get the idea that their backyard rustic cabin is the ideal place for the Brewsters to stay.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: With the arrival of spring, the Countess returns for Granny's new batch of spring tonic. Granny thinks she's looking for a new husband and that Jed is her perfect match.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale owns a building that houses a beatnik's club. He hopes to get rid of them when they can't pay their rent but they find a new a sponsor: Jed Clampett.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed soon regrets helping out the beatniks with their money problems when Jethro, Elly May (and even Granny!) decide to join them.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is appalled to learn that Jed is going door-to-door peddling his services as a handyman. But then he's apoplectic when he discovers that Jed has been hired by a rival bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A long time employee of the Commerce Bank is being forcibly retired to make way for a new computer system. A chance meeting with the Clampetts gives him an idea about dealing with Mr. Drysdale.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Beauregard Short arrives in Beverly Hills from back home. Everyone assumes he's looking for a wife and Jethro decides to show him how to be like him, an international playboy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Brewster, the oil man who made Jed a multi-millionaire, arrives in Beverly Hills with his wife planning to build their dream house. Jed and Granny think they have the perfect house in mind for their dream home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is determined to go back home even if she has to walk back all by herself. When she reaches Las Vegas she has second thoughts. Jethro gets arrested by an undercover cop.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she has a new way of getting rid of the Clampetts: talk Jed into donating their mansion to the city for an art museum. They agree, on the assumption that they are supposed to provide the artworks and not move out.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny confuses Mrs. Drysdale's forays into astrology with the practice of black magic. An intended gift for Ellie Mae from Mr. Drysdale only adds to the confusion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is anxious to become a new "Double Naught" spy and Mr. Drysdale gives him his own office. A bank robber hopes to con an unwitting Jethro into helping him get into the bank vault.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When the Clampetts decide they want to go home for Possum Day, Mr. Drysdale attempts to put together a Possum Day in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks the Drysdale's young attractive maid is interested in him. He commences to courting her but she is actually interested in watching the football game on the Clampett's color TV.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's concocts a love potion for Elly Mae at the same time Mr. Drysdale hires an escort for Elly. Dean arrives at the mansion with the Clampetts believing he's Miss Jane's boyfriend so Granny tries a reverse spell.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Lucas Sebastian, a billionaire entrepreneur, wants Jed to invest in his new venture, undersea farming.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Farquar, Mrs. Drysdale's father comes for a visit. When he's alone with Drysdale, he reveals he's broke. It seems on his way over, he passed through Las Vegas and lost his whole fortune and is asking Drysdale for a handout, which he refuses.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Daddy Farquhar continues to visit the Clampetts' mansion to his daughter Margaret's displeasure. He has plans for Granny and her money in Las Vegas but she's expecting a marriage proposal.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro wants to be a general and Mr. Drysdale decides the safest idea is to get him into a boys military academy. With Jethro twice the size of the other boys, the commander has his doubts while a mock battle confuses Granny and Jed.

programme.desc: (S01E009) Sympathy and responsibility are at odds when Brenda volunteers for a teen crisis hotline.

programme.desc: (S01E010) The chemistry between Brenda and Dylan starts to heat up when Brenda accidentally catches him in the shower, then comforts him after he fights with his father.

programme.desc: (S01E016) Brandon is "discovered" when he's out roller-blading, landing a role as an emergency extra on a big TV show.

programme.desc: (S01E017) Brenda's had it with home life and West Beverly and decides to leave both for the real world.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E018) The Walsh twins and all their friends are panicked by the upcoming SATs, but then everything gets put in perspective when Brenda finds a lump in her breast and faces a test no one can prepare for.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E019) Brandon interviews a classmate, Roger, who's an outstanding athlete and student--and haunted by the overbearing success of his father.

programme.desc: (S01E020) Baseball fever strikes when Brandon is asked to coach a little league team after his dad gets injured.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210

programme.title: Roc

programme.desc: Roc (CHARLES S. DUTTON) throws a retirement party for a fellow garbageman but ends up alone.

programme.desc: Moesha is attracted to a substitute teacher at Crenshaw. After they kiss, he leaves the school for 'personal reasons'.

programme.desc: Ceaser fumes after discovering a New Orleans employee is a mole, Puma and O'S**t take advantage of Young Bae to wreck the 113th shop, and Alex's dad faces a risky surgery.

programme.desc: Ceaser reconnects with his daughter Cheyenne, Young Bae hires a new receptionist who has to prove herself to the crew, and Alex starts to notice some relationship red flags.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.desc: Melody's relationship with Lalo begins to fall apart, Ceaser hires Sky's son as an intern to keep him out of trouble, and Donna crashes the shop paint party to apologize.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser freaks out when Sky decides to open her own side business in Miami, Melody struggles to keep her family together, and Jadah gets revenge on Teddy for dating Tati.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Sky goes behind Ceaser's back to open her boutique in Miami, Young Bae's mom pressures her daughter to get married in two weeks, and Donna's twin sister disapproves of Alex.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.desc: Sky's vengeful return and an emergency involving Rob throw Bae's wedding into chaos, Teddy and Tati make it official, and the fired employees of Black Ink come together.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Sky has a run-in with an enemy, Alex faces a medical emergency, Ceaser gets protective when his daughter goes on her first date, and a violent act leads to chaos at the shop.

programme.desc: When Dee Dee complains her new co-worker, Brett, is questioning her ability to do her job because she is a woman, Charles and Spencer decide they need to intervene on her behalf.

programme.desc: To boost her spirits from her failing acting career, Big Dee Dee decides to throw a big Legends Ball. Mona begins to worry that her new relationship with Chase is only based on the physical.

programme.desc: Mark and Vanessa think that they won the lottery but can't find their winning ticket.

programme.desc: Mark's good advice to Earvin about romance somehow causes Earvin to elope with his new girlfriend, and Earvin's mother wants Mark to stop the couple.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper
programme.desc: Mark tries to help Geneva's boyfriend become a part of his group of male friends with disastrous results. Nicole hides a stray cat in her room, but Vanessa is allergic to cats.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Hogar dulce hogar
programme.desc: Jamie involucra a Danny cuando encuentra a un adolescente sin hogar que afirma que su tía fue asesinada por su novio. Mientras tanto, Erin se enfurece cuando McCoy la reemplaza como fiscal en un caso que involucra a un guardia de prisión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Historias de amor
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan cuando un propietario dispara a un intruso, solo para descubrir que el intruso es un sicario. Además, un joven abogado intenta hacer justicia para su madre, a quien Erin envió a prisión por un cargo de asesinato hace 12 años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas con grandes seguidores en las redes sociales son encontradas muertas en Maryland, la UAC busca un sospechoso asumiendo la personalidad de una leyenda urbana de Internet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un destacado abogado desaparece en Boston, la UAC descubre secretos en su pasado que podrían señalar las razones de su desaparición.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga crímenes aleatorios en el norte de Virginia y busca a un sospechoso del conflicto, que tiene un deseo incontrolable de matar, él también está lleno de remordimiento.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al UAC a Salt Lake City, Utah, para investigar un triple asesinato, la búsqueda de una conexión entre las víctimas podría llevarlos hasta un fugitivo que podría estar relacionado con el sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan la muerte de un intruso en Quantico, Jimmy y Kasie se ven expuestos a una biotoxina mortal y deben pedir ayuda a la doctora Carol Wilson para encontrar el antídoto.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo investiga la muerte de un cirujano reservista voluntario de los Navy SEALs, se ven obligados a solicitar la ayuda de Kayla (Naomi Grace), la hija de Vance, para llevar a cabo una misión peligrosa.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El pasado delictivo de Parker resurge cuando el NCIS es llamado a Filadelfia para investigar la muerte de un suboficial de la Marina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un espantoso acontecimiento en la fiesta de revelación de sexo de un suboficial de la Marina lleva al NCIS al caso de una profesora desaparecida que se popularizó en un podcast de crímenes reales.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Historias de amor
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan cuando un propietario dispara a un intruso, solo para descubrir que el intruso es un sicario. Además, un joven abogado intenta hacer justicia para su madre, a quien Erin envió a prisión por un cargo de asesinato hace 12 años.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La puerta de los pobres
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un residente de bajos ingresos en un edificio de lujo con unidades asequibles. Frank se enfrenta a un problema con un detective amigo de Gormley que abusa de su posición.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Jugadores energéticos
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave se retira, Erin debe traer a un informante protegido de la mafia a Nueva York y mantenerlo a salvo con ayuda de Danny y Maria. Frank mantiene tensas negociaciones con el alcalde Poole.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Sin salida
programme.desc: Un hombre emocionalmente perturbado retiene a Maria como rehén a punta de pistola en una sala de interrogatorios. Danny debe cumplir sus demandas para protegerla. Mientras, Frank enfrenta un dilema personal y moral.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/2/2023. In the jungles of Yucatán State, on the eastern edge of Mexico, Longoria explores the home of the ancient Maya, where a fierce pride in that ancestry still permeates every custom and dish, even in the most innovative kitchens.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/9/2023. Travelling to the mountains of Southern Mexico, Longoria discovers the hidden magic of Oaxaca that boasts some of the finest ingredients in Mexico, including chocolate, corn, tomatoes and the much-loved quesillo cheese.

programme.title: First Ladies
programme.desc: Aired 10/25/2020. Eleanor Roosevelt’s marriage to Franklin Delano Roosevelt created arguably the most formidable political partnership in American history. The episode explores how a desolate childhood sowed the seeds of a life devoted to standing up ...

programme.title: First Ladies

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/26/15. Anthony Bourdain returns to Korea after 10 years to experience hyper-modern Seoul, and taste Korean fried chicken, vintage army stew and Kimchi.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/03/15. Anthony Bourdain gets a taste of Miami with cow foot soup in Little Haiti and a personal lesson on sights and sounds from musician Questlove.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/10/15. Anthony Bourdain visits one of his favorite cities in Europe — Glasgow— where he makes his first stop at the Old College Bar for a pint.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/17/15. Anthony Bourdain explores the island nation of Madagascar, where he visits the capital city of Tana and samples Malagasy cuisine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/31/15. Anthony Bourdain travels to his childhood home state with his brother Chris, where they rekindle memories at the classic roadside joint, Hiram’s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/07/15. Bourdain explores the beauty, culture, and food of Budapest, where he samples goulash, fisherman's soup, blood sausage, and chicken liver.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/14/15. There’s another side to Hawaii that many tourists don’t know about. Go with Anthony Bourdain as he explores the unknown area.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/21/15. Anthony Bourdain travels to Beirut, where he discovers a beautiful country known for its vibrant nightlife and legendary cuisine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/25/2015. Anthony Bourdain visits Addis Ababa, to sample dishes like injera bread and soak up Ethiopian melodies with chef Marcus Samuelsson.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/01/2015. Anthony Bourdain returns to Borneo after 10 years to enjoy chicken rendang and pork noodles in the street food paradise of Kuala Lumpur.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/08/2015. Anthony Bourdain explores the mixing of food, culture and politics in Istanbul, as he enjoys an authentic Turkish breakfast and watches an oil wrestling match.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/26/15. Anthony Bourdain returns to Korea after 10 years to experience hyper-modern Seoul, and taste Korean fried chicken, vintage army stew and Kimchi.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/03/15. Anthony Bourdain gets a taste of Miami with cow foot soup in Little Haiti and a personal lesson on sights and sounds from musician Questlove.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A lawbreaker tries to convince the cops that he's a good guy, and deputies smell trouble during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distressed woman leads the cops to her abusive fiance, and a couple of officers are suspicious when they pull over an overly friendly man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a suspected animal cruelty call, a fight between neighbors turns violent, and deputies question a suspicious group behind a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman with warrants tries to avoid jail time, deputies confront a hit-and-run suspect, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Emotions run high when a dispute between siblings gets out of hand, a man struggles to keep his story straight with the police, and deputies investigate a domestic incident.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The K-9 unit tracks down a man fleeing on foot, a father is left with no choice but to call the cops on his son, and a former gang member is found with a stolen firearm.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy calls for backup when he's outnumbered, a former Marine damages his neighbors' property, and a husband and wife are separated after their vehicle is searched.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man pulls out all the stops to elude the police, a civilian steps in when she spots a violent crime in progress, and a suspected shoplifter is confronted by officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit switches gears when the driver flees on foot, an altercation causes tension between neighbors, and a driver is irate when officers search his passenger.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man attempts to hide at his grandmother's house, police arrest a suspect driving a stolen vehicle, and officers call animal control for an injured dog.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies pull a man from a devastating car wreck after a high-speed chase, officers apprehend and question a robbery suspect, and a wanted man tries to flee from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A parolee leads deputies on a high-speed chase, police respond to a domestic disturbance call, and an officer helps frustrated citizens settle their differences.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A detective is injured after chasing a man driving a stolen car, a bar fight ends with a couple in handcuffs, and an officer finds a variety of items during a vehicle search.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation, and officers question a colorful trio of suspects.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called when a mother's job hunt takes a turn for the worse, and deputies confront a nervous man with a lot of bad habits.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young man receives a wake-up call when police catch him breaking the law, and officers play peacemakers after a board game sparks a family feud.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A defiant motorist is shocked when his mother sides with the law, and deputies discover a man wearing a bizarre costume during a routine traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An evasive driver blames his girlfriend for his behavior, a pregnant woman makes some questionable choices, and a robbery suspect finds comfort in coming clean.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers intervene when a dispute between neighbors gets heated, suspects of a shooting lead police on a high-speed pursuit, and a domestic argument gets out of hand.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an armed suspect, the cops are called when a man damages his neighbor's window, and deputies investigate a parking garage known for illegal activity.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspected jewelry thieves attempt a daring escape during a pursuit, a man gives officers a challenge during his arrest, and a traffic stop puts a marriage in jeopardy.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara is uneasy about Grissom being reunited with Lady Heather during the CSIs' investigation of her attempted murder by a client she refuses to name.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As the CSI team comes closer than ever to identifying the miniature killer, Sara mysteriously goes missing, forcing her relationship with Grissom out into the open.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara's fate remains in question as the CSI team rushes to find out if she survived an attack by the miniature killer, on the eighth season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates two unusual cases, one involving the suspicious death of a go-cart racer who took his hobby to the highway and paid the price with his life, and a murder at a hip new restaurant where patrons dine in the dark.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of an entire family, except for one daughter, who supposedly is possessed by the devil.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover a young man strangled to death by hanging ...whose body looks like that of a woman.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team goes behind the scenes at a horror porn film studio to investigate the murder of a slasher film actress murdered on the set of one of her movies.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: In Part One of a Two-Part crossover episode to conclude on Without A Trace, a kidnap victim from New York who went missing six years ago may be the same boy whose death Grissom and the CSI team are investigating in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A suspect from Sara's past returns, causing her to question her future as a CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick's addiction to pills begins to impact his job when his investigation into the underground mob in Vegas results in him being targeted as the prime suspect in a mob-related murder case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges has ulterior motives when he stages hypothetical murders in the lab to give his colleagues a chance to play CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team delve into the world of illegal dog fighting to find out who is responsible for the death of a wealthy socialite.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate two murders that take place at the annual bull riding rodeo in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se apresura a encontrar a Morgan y a Ellie Brass después de su secuestro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para investigar un asesinato y un robo en un juego de póquer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un incendio en un concierto musical.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de Investigación de la Escena del Crimen investiga un programa de cocina en vivo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine Willows regresa para ayudar a los miembros de CSI a resolver un caso antiguo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de un indigente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga a un desconocido que aparece muerto después de lluvias torrenciales en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para investigar a un hombre que apareció muerto dentro de una bola para hámster de tamaño para humanos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para investigar el apuñalamiento de una pareja.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un fin de semana de spa para algunos de los miembros del equipo de CSI se convierte en una investigación de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en una fiesta elaborada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato a bordo de un avión que acaba de aterrizar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de Investigación de la Escena del Crimen es llamado para investigar un choque de autos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga dos casos, cada uno de los cuales podría ayudar a resolver el otro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A serial killer taunts the CSIs by leaving them cryptic hints, and the longer it takes them to decode these puzzles, the higher the death toll rises.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team suffers the tragic loss of one of their own when a psychotic genius runs wild in otherwise beautiful Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a bottle girl is murdered at an exclusive club, Horatio must search through Miami's most elite guest list to find her killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young girl is kidnapped and the CSIs' only witness is a blind man, who heard the abduction, leading Horatio to an old nemesis.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the killer of Horatio's wife busts out of prison and goes on a rampage, they must determine what he's after and find him before he strikes again.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a reality star is murdered, the CSIs investigate the cast, the obsessed fans, and the stars' hidden pasts to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man claims to have dreamed of a murder before it happened, Horatio must send Natalia undercover for the team to determine the truth.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a sugar refinery explodes, Horatio Caine and the CSI team make a shocking discovery about one of the factory's employees.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a fisherman narrowly escapes death, the CSI team has to dodge bullets to keep him alive and find out who's after him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a pregnant woman is assaulted, Horatio and the team fight for her and her baby's life while tracking down her attacker.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the investigation of a dead millionaire leads the CSIs to an elite dating service, Ryan poses as a businessman to expose the matchmaker's lies.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a fire hydrant washes away all the evidence at a crime scene, the CSIs must recreate a very bizarre double murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a murder at a roller derby match, the only thing shorter than the girls' skirts are their tempers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami is ablaze with crime and chaos when Memmo Fiero, Horatio Caine's wife's killer, returns to take control of the city.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El club nocturno más sexy de South Beach en Miami se convierte en un hervidero de venganza cuando un asesinato cierra las puertas de un servicio de citas único.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una niña de ocho años se convierte en el peón inocente de un juego feo y abusivo que termina en asesinato. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un reencuentro de la escuela secundaria se vuelve mortal cuando un compañero de clase se deja llevar por un resentimiento de 15 años, Horatio y Yelina descubren que Ray aún puede estar vivo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI trabaja contrarreloj para encontrar al supuesto cómplice en un caso de asesinato con hacha de hace años antes de que se ejecute al asesino convicto.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI corre contra el tiempo para localizar y desactivar una bomba radiactiva que estallará en medio del centro de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI se enfrentan a la infame y mortal pandilla Mala Noche de Miami después de que un funeral se convierte en el escenario de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un accidente de navegación familiar revela un siniestro complot de estafadores para robar diez millones de dólares en lingotes de oro. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el asesinato de una adolescente que estaba de fiesta en Miami de camino a las Bahamas con su clase de secundaria.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un joven enfrenta cadena perpetua, y posiblemente algo peor, a menos que Horatio pueda probar su inocencia contra adversidades insuperables.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo corren contra el tiempo para descubrir quién está tratando de incriminar a Horatio por el asesinato de una mujer con la que ha estado saliendo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un fin de semana de esposas termina en asesinato, el equipo de CSI se enfrenta a tres mujeres cuyas citas separadas con la víctima las convierten en las principales sospechosas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo trabaja en conjunto con el jefe de CSI de Nueva York, Mac Taylor, para arrestar a un asesino en serie antes de que mate a la joven que acaba de tomar como rehén.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ryan Wolfe es atacado y gravemente herido mientras investiga el asesinato de una angustiada futura ex-esposa, y no faltan sospechosos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben confiar en un videojuego para obtener su próxima pista sobre dónde atacará un grupo de jóvenes pistoleros.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team follows up on a 911 call to a vacant penthouse but finds a nearly 100-Year-Old corpse and a booby-trapped house.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A reformed drug addict is found dead in an alley and the CSI New York team discovers he was the victim of a premeditated plot.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a brutal stabbing, they discover that evidence at the crime scene was planted which pits them against a trusted colleague.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a beautiful star quarterback of the lingerie league is found murdered in a hot tub, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in Central Park the CSI New York team is lured into the mysterious subculture of vampirism.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a car racing legend dies in a fiery explosion, the CSI New York team of investigators discovers that car tampering is the cause.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When four victims are found dead in a hotel room and the main suspect turns up wielding an ax, the CSIs try to piece together the details.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When two young journalists are found dead on the eve of St. Patrick's Day, the CSIs try to find the clue at the end of the rainbow.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead, the evidence and autopsy both suggest suicide, but Stella is unconvinced and risks her life to pursue the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A death row inmate's final request brings Hawkes to a Pennsylvania prison and face-to-face with a personal secret just as a prison riot erupts.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The shooting of a 14-year-old boy in front of his 12-year-old brother takes Detective Mac Taylor’s drive for justice to another level.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a slab of concrete starts bleeding in midtown, the CSIs' investigation takes them into an underground world of hardcore fighting.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After being injured, Mac watches his neighbors while recuperating and witnesses mysterious activity that leads to murder.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators follows a trail left by Shane Casey and realizes he is targeting a vacationing Danny out of revenge.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Lectura letal (S5 Ep2)
programme.desc: Un concierto callejero gratuito se convierte rápidamente en la escena de un crimen, la víctima, en este caso, ha sido misteriosamente plagada de radiación.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Turbulencia (S5 Ep3)
programme.desc: Mac viaja a Washington para declarar en el tribunal hasta que se da cuenta de que está cerca de un asesinato cuando una azafata encuentra un cadáver.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sexo, mentiras y silicón (S5 Ep4)
programme.desc: Encuentran muerta a una mujer muy poderosa del mundo de la política y eso deja a muchos desesperados esperando que la información que ella tiene no se filtre.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El costo de vivir (S5 Ep5)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de un joven arqueólogo que pudo haber descubierto la respuesta al misterio de uno de los asesinatos más antiguos de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Suficiente (S5 Ep6)
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a tiros a tres acusados en la víspera de su juicio, Mac se ve obligado a cumplir una promesa que le hizo a un testigo reacio.

programme.title: CSI: New York

programme.title: CSI: New York

programme.title: El retorno de la Pantera Rosa

programme.title: La pantera rosa ataca de nuevo
programme.desc: La incompetencia del Inspector Clouseau (Peter Sellers) acaba enloqueciendo al Inspector Jefe Dreyfus (Herbert Lom) quien se apodera de una máquina para destruir el mundo con el fin de matar a Clouseau. ¿Quién ganará, 26 sicarios o la suerte de Clouseau?

programme.title: Un disparo en la sombra
programme.desc: Al torpe inspector Clouseau (Peter Sellers) se le asigna un importante caso, pero se enamora de la principal sospechosa (Elke Sommer), aumentan los cadáveres y Clouseau debe darse prisa por encontrar al verdadero culpable o su carrera acabará.

programme.title: El retorno de la Pantera Rosa
programme.desc: El ladrón de guante blanco Sir Charles Litton vuelve al ataque. Enviado a la ciudad de Gstadd por su superior, el inspector Dreyfuss, Clouseau adopta una serie de cambios y disfraces mientras investiga a Sir Charles y su mujer Claudine.

programme.title: Rescate al alba
programme.desc: Durante la guerra de Vietnam, el piloto americano, Dieter Dengler (Christian Bale) es derribado y tomado prisionero por el Vietcong. Durante su cautiverio, le tocó vivir una de las experiencias más notables y horrorosas de toda la guerra.

programme.title: Infidelidad
programme.desc: Cuando se descubre la infidelidad de una mujer y su novio, se ven obligados a participar en el retorcido juego de su captor para salvar a los miembros de su familia de ser asesinados.

programme.title: Fargo
programme.desc: Las cosas salen mal cuando el vendedor de autos Jerry Lundegaard (William H. Macy) contrata a dos matones para secuestrar a su esposa, pero la jefa de la policía, Marge Gunderson (Frances McDormand), muy embarazada y alegre, toma el caso.

programme.title: Corrupción ferroviaria
programme.desc: Tras ser liberado de prisión, Leo Handler acepta un trabajo con su poderosamente influyente tío Frank. Leo pronto se ve arrastrado involuntariamente a un mundo de sabotaje, sobornos peligrosos, y hasta asesinato.

programme.title: Paranoia
programme.desc: Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf) pasa los días espiando a los vecinos, mientras cumple un arresto domiciliario de tres meses. Todo es juegos y diversión hasta que las cosas dan un horroroso giro hacia lo peor.

programme.title: Desapareció una noche
programme.desc: La desaparición de una niña en un peligroso vecindario de Boston, une a dos detectives privados con la policía en este fascinante misterio.

programme.title: El señor de la guerra
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage, ganador de un Oscar®, protagoniza esta historia tensa y llena de acción sobre un famoso traficante de armas que vendió armas a dictadores y consiguió eludir la ley durante casi veinte años.

programme.title: Pequeñas grandes amigas
programme.desc: Molly es una princesa fiestera cuyo dinero acaba de agotarse. Ray es una niña quisquillosa cuya niñera acaba de salir huyendo. Cuando Molly es contratada para cuidar de Ray, se forma la combinación perfecta para que ambas chicas cambien sus vidas.

programme.title: Te pido un taxi
programme.desc: Rodrigo está seguro de poder conquistarlas a todas, y nunca se queda con ninguna, porque para él, el amor no existe. En su juego se encontrará con Sol, quién romperá toda regla que él se ha impuesto.

programme.title: Sirenas
programme.desc: Una joven se ve atrapada en una guerra emocional, al lidiar con su primer amor y una madre poco convencional.

programme.title: Mystic pizza
programme.desc: En esta tierna historia de anhelos de juventud, Julia Roberts, Annabeth Gish y Lili Taylor, son tres chicas trabajando en una pizzería y soñando con un futuro brillante fuera de su pueblecito Mystic, Connecticut.

programme.title: Shakespeare apasionado
programme.desc: Lady Viola inspira a Will Shakespeare, cura su bloqueo de escritor y reaviva su amor por el romance. Gwyneth Paltrow, Joseph Fiennes, Ben Affleck y Dame Judi Dench protagonizan esta historia ganadora del Óscar a Mejor Película.

programme.title: Todo sucede en Elizabethtown
programme.desc: Una fábula optimista y jocosa que aborda los temas de la vida y la muerte de una forma sorpresiva y emocionante. Es sobre la trayectoria inesperada que toma la vida de un joven y la mujer que lo ayuda a ver con otros ojos el mundo que lo rodea.

programme.title: La ley de Murphy
programme.desc: Charles Bronson interpreta a un policía de Los Ángeles acusado de asesinato por Joan Freeman, una expresidiaria despiadada a quien había encarcelado. A la carrera, y esposado a una ladrona de poca monta, busca a Freeman, mientras ella sigue matando.

programme.title: Perdido en la fama
programme.desc: Un rockero semi retirado y caprichoso (Antonio Banderas) debe espabilarse para rescatar a su esposa, quien ha sido secuestrada mientras se encontraba de vacaciones en Chile.

programme.title: El hombre sin pasado
programme.desc: Un tranquilo cuidador en una casa de empeño, con un pasado violento, se enfrenta a una red de tráfico de drogas y órganos con la esperanza de salvar a una niña que es su única amiga.

programme.title: Juego de ladrones
programme.desc: Un ladrón veterano (Morgan Freeman) contrata a uno más joven (Antonio Banderas) para ayudarle a hacer un último trabajo para saldar una deuda con la mafia rusa.

programme.title: Perdido en la fama
programme.desc: Un rockero semi retirado y caprichoso (Antonio Banderas) debe espabilarse para rescatar a su esposa, quien ha sido secuestrada mientras se encontraba de vacaciones en Chile.

programme.title: Robocop
programme.desc: Cuando unos criminales hacen volar por los aires a un policía modelo, un equipo de científicos y doctores le reconstruyen a partir de sus restos y le convierten en un organismo cibernético, programado para combatir el crimen sin descanso: Robocop.

programme.title: Robocop 2
programme.desc: En Detroit reina el caos debido a una huelga policial y a una nueva droga, y solo Robocop (Peter Weller) puede parar este alboroto. Sin embargo, se topará con un duro cíborg, por lo que Robocop necesitará emplearse a fondo para salvar la ciudad.

programme.title: Ilusiones S.A.
programme.desc: Para hacer feliz a su mujer, un hombre contrata a una empresa que crea fantasías para fingir que su nieto, quien los dejó hace años, es un hombre de bien. Pero el verdadero nieto, quien es en realidad un delincuente, se aparece exigiendo dinero.

programme.title: Viva
programme.desc: Jesus is a young hairdresser working at a Havana nightclub that showcases drag performers, who dreams of being a performer himself. But when his father has different expectations, the men struggle to understand one another and reconcile as a family.

programme.title: La luz incidente
programme.desc: Una mujer joven que tiene problemas al criar a sus hijas gemelas después de que su marido y su hermano mueren, acepta el cortejo de un pretendiente encantador pero misterioso, mayor que ella.

programme.title: El dedo
programme.desc: Después de años de dictadura, una aldea remota se convierte formalmente en una ciudad con el nacimiento de su habitante número 501, creando una apertura para el cargo de Mayer.

programme.title: Santitos
programme.desc: Tras la repentina muerte de su hija, Esperanza se resiste a aceptar el hecho. Con su enorme fe en los milagros hace que se le aparezca San Judas Tadeo y le muestre el camino para encontrar lo que ha perdido.

programme.title: Fuera del cielo
programme.desc: El drama de 24 horas comienza a las 6 de la mañana con el joven Cucú, cuyo hermano Malboro lo recibe después de una separación de cinco años. Una vez reunidos, planean un robo que los lleva a una serie de encuentros con diferentes personas.

programme.title: Aqui Entre Nos (LAS)
programme.desc: Cansado de ser dado por sentado por su esposa y sus 3 hijas, Rodolfo Guerra se levanta una mañana y decide no ir a trabajar. Entonces comienza la locura.

programme.title: La mejor Navidad
programme.desc: Gloria, enfocada en su trabajo en Miami después de su divorcio, envía a sus hijos a pasar la Navidad con su exmarido en Jalisco. Lo que no imaginan es que esta decisión les va a cambiar la vida.

programme.title: La cabaña de Navidad
programme.desc: María viaja de vacaciones a las montañas con su novio. En el camino, se encuentran con una niña que se había torcido el tobillo, y que casualmente es la hija de un antiguo amigo de la niñez.

programme.title: La vela de Navidad
programme.desc: En Gladsbury, hay una leyenda que dice que cada 25 años un ángel los visita para tocar una vela en la víspera de la Navidad y conceder un milagro a quien la prenda. Pero esto podría cambiar tras la llegada de un joven sacerdote.

programme.title: Lucy shimmers y el príncipe de la paz
programme.desc: Otra oportunidad aparece cuando un duro criminal se encuentra con una preciosa niña que es ayudada por un ángel para cambiar los corazones durante la Navidad.

programme.desc: La aparición de un nuevo Mega Shark amenaza la tierra. Rusia vuelve a despertar accidentalmente al Kolossus, un gigantesco dispositivo construido durante la Guerra Fría. Ahora el mundo debe detener a las dos criaturas antes de que destruyan el planeta.

programme.title: El mega tiburón contra Crocosaurus
programme.desc: El enorme tiburón prehistórico sobrevivió a su última batalla, y el mundo se ve amenazado nuevamente cuando se descubre un enemigo nuevo y más peligroso en las selvas de África.

programme.title: El mega tiburón contra el pulpo gigante
programme.desc: Incidentes inexplicables están ocurriendo en todo el Océano Pacífico cuando un grupo de científicos rebeldes descubrió un tiburón megalodón prehistórico y se ha desatado un pulpo gigante gracias a una operación militar ilegal.

programme.title: El mega tiburón contra el mecha tiburón
programme.desc: Cuando un nuevo Megatiburón amenaza a la humanidad, el gobierno desata al Mechatiburón para derrotar al monstruo en una batalla que pone en riesgo al planeta entero.

programme.title: Fantasmas

programme.title: Black Clover

programme.desc: The history of Genkai and Toguro is finally revealed; Toguro and Genkai battle; Genkai falls.

programme.title: Yuyu Hakusho
programme.desc: Yusuke distraught over the death of Genkai. But his team must move on and overcome their despair.

programme.title: Shadows House
programme.desc: The Star Bearers have determined that the soot pipes are the origin of the phantoms.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino cereal
programme.desc: Cuando un incendio destruyó la mayor parte de una casa y un niño desapareció, la policía organizó la búsqueda más grande en la historia de su pequeña ciudad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un vecino vio cómo un hombre apuñalaba a su esposa, la empujaba a la piscina y le metía la cabeza bajo el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Voto de silencio
programme.desc: Una mirada al caso contra Jack Reeves. Unos amigos informaron que su novia por correo había desaparecido. La policía centró sus sospechas en Reeves y, mientras buscaba pistas, descubrió información que lo vinculaba con la muerte de dos ex esposas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece sin dejar rastro. A pesar de que se sospecha de un juego sucio, las pistas no funcionan y la investigación se estanca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Jardín del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un popular disc jockey fue encontrado asesinado en un jardín comunitario, la policía entró en acción.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El caso musical
programme.desc: En 1999, una niña de 12 años fue encontrada asesinada en su casa y cambió la sensación de seguridad que tenían los residentes de la pequeña ciudad de Waseca, Minnesota.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sin oraciones
programme.desc: La fundadora de American Atheists desapareció en 1995 junto con uno de sus hijos y su nieta, junto con 500,000 dólares en monedas de oro. La policía se centró en varios sospechosos, incluyendo a David R. Waters, que trabajaba para los Ateos Americanos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompecabezas de plástico
programme.desc: Un hombre que iba en bicicleta resultó herido de muerte y la policía creía que había sido víctima de un accidente de atropello y fuga.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, de 35 años, fue condenada por el asesinato de David Nixon en Abril del 2002 después de que él había planeado terminar su relación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Condena por Huella de Palma de Mano
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre un asesinato se ve favorecida por un requisito legal de que los bares tengan cámaras de video instaladas en las instalaciones. Video, cabello y sangre conducen al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a la esposa de un dentista bien conocido, la policía se esfuerza por identificar a un sospechoso. Algunas fibras y un estudio de los patrones climáticos en la noche del asesinato abren el caso y revelan al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2001, Ginger Hayes y su pequeño hijo fueron secuestrados durante un robo de auto. El crimen había sido reportado por un testigo a los pocos minutos de ocurrir.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Robert Sims regresa a casa después de trabajar en el turno de noche y encuentra a su esposa inconsciente en el piso de la cocina. Su hijo está profundamente dormido en una habitación de arriba, pero su hija de seis semanas, Heather, no está.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de 13 años desapareció de su casa en Colorado y la única evidencia que dejó el secuestrador fueron tres huellas digitales en la cortina de una ventana.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 12 de Mayo de 1994, Crystal Perry fue asesinado viciosamente en su casa en Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, de 32 años, fue encontrado culpable del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Darlene Vander Giesen recibió correos electrónicos amenazantes y luego desapareció. Rastrear los correos electrónicos llevó a la policía a la casa de Daphne Wright, donde creen que se cometió un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Ryan Stallings, de cuatro meses, muere en circunstancias sospechosas, su madre finalmente es condenada por su asesinato. Pero meses después, surgen nuevas pruebas de una fuente sorprendente – su hermano recién nacido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre un brutal ataque a dos niños cerca de un estanque se basa en pruebas extraídas de las aguas turbias. Fue el primer caso en el que se utilizó evidencia de Diatomea (algas) para ubicar a un sospechoso en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando el secretario de la corte, Peter Porco, no se presenta a trabajar en noviembre de 2004, se ordena a un oficial de la corte que se dirija a la casa familiar de los Porcos en Bethlehem, Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido agredida sexualmente y apuñalada hasta la muerte en la playa. Se descubrió un par de zapatos de tenis de hombre cerca de su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intrusión bienvenida
programme.desc: Un hombre le dice a la policía que le disparó a un intruso que había atacado y asesinado a su esposa. El marido pinta un cuadro trágico y es apodado héroe.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, Kathryn Bishop de 82 años es encontrada muerta en su hogar de Pennsylvania. Pequeñas pistas en el cuerpo de la víctima le dirán a la policía lo que pasó esa noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Kathy Augustine, una política de Nevada, murió misteriosamente durante una campaña de reelección. El médico forense no pudo aislar la causa de la muerte ni explicar las pequeñas heridas punzantes descubiertas durante la autopsia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, en Grand Junction, Colorado suceden una serie de bombardeos que matan a dos personas y lastiman a uno más. La policía corre para poder encontrar al culpable antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 11 años desapareció de un pequeño pueblo en un área remota de Alaska, los investigadores se preguntaron si había sido atacada por un oso o se había perdido en los densos bosques.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un policía fuera de servicio murió de un disparo, sus colegas oficiales estaban determinados a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Horizon

programme.title: Horizon

programme.title: Horizon

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Whale Adventure With Nigel Marven

programme.title: Whale Adventure With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: The whales' journey takes them right up the coast of California, where the hustle and bustle of human activity is a stark contrast to the peace of the Mexican desert.

programme.title: Whale Adventure With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: As the whales continue into the cold seas of the Pacific Northwest, Nigel enjoys the celebrations of the Quileute Tribe as they hold their annual 'Welcome the Whales' ceremony.

programme.title: Whale Adventure With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: The whales are now on the home straight, and Nigel travels to the Bering Sea in the far west of Alaska to try to see them as they pass.

programme.title: Vicious Beauties - The Secret World of Jellyfish
programme.desc: Watching the graceful movement of these gelatinous animals is almost hypnotic. Although their bodies are 98% water, jellyfish are deceptively clever and dangerous. But where do these primordial creatures come from?

programme.title: Unlikely Animal Friends
programme.desc: An elephant holds vigil for a sick dog. A baby hippo chooses a giant tortoise as a surrogate parent. A lion instantly recognizes two men a year after their last encounter. And a lioness turns down an easy kill when she comes across a baby oryx.

programme.title: The Last Reef

programme.title: The Lembeh Strait Walking Fish
programme.desc: Whale sharks, manta rays, and other big fish were once common in the narrow Lembeh Strait in Indonesia, but overfishing has long since eradicated the larger species.

programme.title: The Living Sea
programme.desc: From the tropical waters of Palau in the South Pacific, to the barreling waves of Oahu's North Shore and Nova Scotia's major tidal swings, The Living Sea celebrates the beauty, power and importance of the ocean.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While gearing up to face the television cameras as captain of his high school's team on "Quiz-Em", Alex panics at first when a teammate drops out and then launches a tutoring program a la Eliza Doolittle for his sister Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse gets so wrapped up in work that she neglects her family.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When pretty Carrie Newman and her mother Julia come to visit the Keatons, Carrie's forward behavior sends Alex into a panic.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory secretly submits a picture of Elyse and herself to an ad agency for a mother-daughter-modeling contest.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Mallory's boyfriend Jeff arrives home from college and wants to go steady, she's elated, but it's soon apparent that he's a little awed by the school and merely grasping at the familiar.

programme.desc: While working as a DJ at the school radio station, Alex strikes up a telephone friendship with caller Lorraine Ferrar.

programme.desc: Steven and Elyse worry that Jennifer's softball team coach is pushing the girls too hard.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: Mallory turns to Alex for some advice when she begins to fear she'll lose her new boyfriend unless she agrees to his pleas for a more "adult" romance.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike’s elation at Colleen’s acceptance to medical school quickly turns to disappointment when colleen chooses to marry Andrew instead.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: In the series opener, we meet Jonathan Smith, a probationary angel who has been sent to help people on Earth. He befriends residents at a retirement home. The administrator at the home has a brother named Mark who is suspicious of Jonathan.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps the residents of Havencrest, when they learn that the retirement home is going to be sold. Jonathan must reveal his real identity to Mark in order to complete the assignment.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps a terminally ill boy and his mother. Meanwhile, Mark deals with a thief abandoned by his folks.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help aging movie heroes to stand up to a street gang known as Satan's Helpers. They persuade a young boxer not to throw a big fight when the gang tries to bully him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark assist a young country singer who is hoping to follow in her mother's footsteps. Next, they help a widow mourning her late husband.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan must find a way to help Deke, a college football star whose dreams of reaching the pros are shattered by a tragic motorcycle accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan enlists the aid of a gymnast to rehabilitate Deke. Meanwhile, Deke's parents have been deeply affected by the accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A construction company tycoon now believes he's King Arthur, and his estranged son determines to have him declared incompetent. Can Jonathan work a reconciliation?

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark have been hired to look after the kids of a movie star who never has time to spend with his family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: An elderly scriptwriter needs someone to bankroll his movie. Meanwhile, Mark has fallen in love with an attractive woman, but Jonathan receives news about her from higher up.

programme.title: District 13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Two years have passed since elite police officer Damien Tomasso teamed up with reformed vigilante Leito to save the notorious District 13, a racially charged ghetto populated by violent drug-dealing gangs and vicious killers.

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike is a tough hitman, who makes his hits look like accidents or suicide. He's in a gang of hitmen, each with his own style. When his loved ex is killed, Mike looks for those responsible.

programme.title: Accident Man: Hitman's Holiday
programme.desc: A hit man must beat the top assassins in the world.

programme.title: Ong Bak
programme.desc: Raised by monks who taught him the Thai martial art of muay thai, Ting (Tony Jaa) is sent to Bangkok to retrieve the stolen head of the town's statue of the Buddha.

programme.title: Ong Bak 2: The Beginning
programme.desc: Tony Jaa stars in this epic tale of revenge set hundreds of years in the past. This prequel to Ong-Bak: The Thai Warrior takes Jaa's skills to the next level, showcasing him as a master of a wide range of martial arts styles.

programme.title: The Protector
programme.desc: Kham, a young fighter must go to Australia to retrieve his stolen elephant. He must take on a gang led by two deadly bodyguards and an evil woman.

programme.title: Paradox
programme.desc: When his daughter goes missing, a police negotiator (Louis Koo) teams with local police (Tony Jaa) to find her, but instead finds himself embroiled in a web of corruption and violence in this explosive thriller from director Wilson Yip.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The doctors at the hospital couldn't determine the cause of Bobby Curley's hallucinations and intense pain. They treated it as a neurological disorder but his condition deteriorated. He was being poisoned.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt. Platt later turns up dead in an ocean with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Faced with three homicides that appear to be professional executions, investigators on both sides of the Atlantic must find a common thread between the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1990s, the media dubbed Richard Rogers the "Last Call Killer" because he targeted men in gay bars who were obviously intoxicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of employees' jobs. Forensic investigators must determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Kathy Lorick was murdered on a Concord, California jogging trail while talking to her husband on her mobile phone.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: By using techniques she saw on forensic science TV shows, a mother determines who was responsible for the accident that permanently injured her 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two suspects are linked to a murder by bloodstained boots and a gun, but the owner of the items says he has never met the victim. Investigators hope manufacturing codes from beer bottles will determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family were executed in their own home. For three years, the murders went unsolved. Finally, a 30-year-old box of ammunition and some fluorescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Survivors of Nazi atrocities recognized Archbishop Trifa, former head of the Romanian Orthodox Church in America, as having directed a bloody attack against Jews during World War II. He was deported in 1984 and died three years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial rapist is on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: The teens grapple with failure after Cruger hails the A squad.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Jack needs to decide what he really wants to do with his life and the Rangers are dealt a shocking revelation.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: With Cruger captured, the A Squad is sent by Gruumm to finish off the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Omni descends to Earth and Gruumm makes his last stand against the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: A spell has been broken and evil is emerging to destroy the Earth. The sorceress Udonna needs to find 5 teens from Briarwood to take on the powers of the warriors of the past to fight the evil.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Xander, Vida, Chip, and Madison finally tap into their Mystic Force powers, but without a Red Ranger, Udonna and Clare know they are in trouble.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Chip and Vida think they can learn more spell codes by doing community service, but learn that real heroes are born in the face of danger.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Nick thinks Madison is too shy. When she gets turned to stone, Nick finds out he's wrong.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: The others think Nick stole some money. Nick hears voices in his head and finds out its Koragg. Koragg battles the Rangers and steals their Megazord power.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: While in battle, Nick is whisked away with Catastros to another dimension. He must face his fears of Catastros. In the end he ends up combining with Catastros to defeat the monster.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Xander thinks he knows how to be a leader. When it comes to getting the Fire Heart before Necrolai, Xander has to follow in order to lead.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: A new DJ, DJ Fly, comes to town. Chip finds out that DJ Fly is really turning the teens of Briarwood into vampires, including Vida. After destroying the Fly Trap Monster, the teens turn back to normal. All except Vida who still remains a vampire.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Fly Trap has been destroyed, but Vida is still a vampire. The Rangers find out that Necrolai is the vampire who bit Vida. Chip is determined to save her from being a vampire.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Xander has a big zit. He thinks he can get rid of it by using a perfection potion. Instead Xander starts turning into a tree. Vida has to help Xander and then the Rangers have to protect and figure out the secret of the Fire Heart.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Clare takes on the legacy of her mother as the Gatekeeper. Koragg captures Udonna. Necrolai is about to destroy the Rangers. Clare steps forward and the forces of evil use her to raise the gate.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
